summary.title: Complete Sybil Attack Detected: 10 Clusters
summary.description: All 62 scanned wallets were flagged as Sybil, forming 10 distinct clusters. The analysis revealed high confidence signals, particularly from shared funders and louvain community structures, indicating a coordinated attack. This poses a significant risk to network integrity.
